primary_text:
$50 a month. That is your entire vet budget for routine care. Done.

Unlimited consults at your local vet. All vaccinations and boosters. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 VetChat for the "is this normal?" moments.

No more guessing what the bill will be. No more skipping visits because you are not sure you can afford it.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: $50/month. Your whole vet budget. Done.
description: Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. One fee, no surprises. Cancel anytime.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Bold typography. $50 large, inclusions as checkmarks. Feels confident, simple, trustworthy.
